channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-13
item.description:
It's been an exciting period across our open-source research tools, with numerous updates and improvements. Notably, the `scienceverse/metacheck` project saw significant additions, including the implementation of OpenScales OSD export, while `MicheleNuijten/statcheck` underwent administrative updates. Meanwhile, `giladfeldman/docpluck` addressed several issues, including a rendering fix and documentation updates. The `Davidvandijcke/coarse` project re-enabled Fable 5 in the model picker, and `JamieCummins/regcheck` introduced a "lock precheck" feature. Additionally, `giladfeldman/escicheck` was synchronized with the `escicheckapp` repository, and `shaheedazaad/auto-zcurve` revised its validation note with a new citation. These updates demonstrate the active collaboration and progress within our community, with many projects interconnected and building upon each other to advance research and science.

25 commits across 2 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

regcheck22 commits
metacheck3 commits

item.title: metacheck: 2 commits today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

The `data_check` branch was the focus of the recent work, with additions made by Lakens on July 13, 2026. Specifically, the OpenScales OSD export was implemented end-to-end, with changes spanning three files, as noted in the commit message. On the same branch, Lakens also made changes to "improve cache, keep original data, better hardcoded folders" on July 7, 2026. The `data_check` branch saw another addition by Lakens on July 13, 2026, although the details of this change are not specified beyond being described as "additions". No other branches were worked on during this period.

2 commit(s) today:

  • a4b8270 [data_check] additions — Lakens
  • 69afca1 [data_check] The OpenScales OSD export now exists end-to-end. Work spanned three files: — Lakens

View all commits →

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where administrative updates were made. The commit message specifically mentions "admin updates", indicating that changes were made to the administrative aspects of the repository. A merge was also performed on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, incorporating changes from the same branch on the remote repository, as indicated by the message "Merge branch 'feature-non-apa-newer' of https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck into feature-non-apa-newer". The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch is the only branch that was modified in these commits. The changes made were limited to administrative updates and a merge operation.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: regcheck: 2 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

The `main` branch received a commit that added a "lock precheck" with the note that it's "for now", indicating a potentially temporary solution. The `main` branch also had a merge from the `staging` branch, incorporating changes from that branch into `main`. Prior to the merge, the `main` branch had a commit that separated the precheck as its own application, altering the structure of the codebase. The `staging` branch was worked on, although the specific changes made in this branch are not detailed in the provided commit messages, only that its changes were merged into `main`.

2 commit(s) today:

  • 039d789 [main] lock precheck (for now!) — Jamie Cummins
  • 6d3db76 [main] Merge branch 'staging' — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →
